entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Students will explore characteristics shared by all Image-Bearers and learn how to guard against good servants becoming bad masters by continuing Charlotte Mason's text written directly to students. Students begin Book II in this course and finish it in Part 5.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Citizenship: Grade 10 (U.S.), Citizenship: Grade 10 (Canada)

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: Ourselves by Charlotte Mason is scheduled over five years. In a multi-age context, students can jump into the book wherever the class is reading. Otherwise, students should begin the book in Part 1.
